Quality Education.reason: As a required university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops 'Basic language skills' and 'Practical ability' for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 具備基礎語言能力 Basic language skills
具備卓越之專業實務能力 Practical ability

evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。 Respect Copyright.
